revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''VTS-2012-12

A period of duty is the total time that a VTSO will be required to be present at the VTS Centre irrespective of whether or not the VTSO is carrying out actual watchkeeping duties at a VTS workstation.


Source: IALA Guideline 1045 (2005)

(VTS33/output/8 refers)
